title: Create: Ore Factory
description: Currently adds crafts for gold, copper, zinc and redstone.
body:
Currently adds Steel Ingot, Zinc Solution, Crystallized Zinc, Zinc Powder and crafts for gold and copper.
- _Craft for Steel Ingot:_
  > **Any coal and Iron Ingot (Mixing, heated) -> 2 Steel Ingots**
- _Craft for Copper:_
  > **Clay ball (Washing) -> 25% Copper nugget, 5% Gold Ingot**
- _Craft for Gold:_
  > **Steel Ingot, Copper Ingot (Compacting, heated) -> 50% Gold Ingot**
- _Craft for Zinc Solution:_
  > **Gravel, Sand and 2 Cobblestones (Mixing, heated) -> 20 mB Zinc Solution**
- _Craft for Crystallized Zinc:_
  > **100 mB Zinc Solution (Mixing, heated) -> Crystallized Zinc**
- Craft for Zinc Powder:_
  > **Crystallized Zinc (Crushing) -> Zinc Powder, 15% additional Zinc Powder**
- _Renewable craft for Zinc Ingot:_
  > **Zinc Powder (Compacting, heated) -> 80% Zinc Ingot and 20% Zinc Ingot**
- _Craft for Redstone:_
  > **50 mB Lava, 2 iron nuggets and copper nugget (Mixing) -> Redstone, 15% Redstone**
